LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT DEIRDRE BENNETT'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE, CCP 1179 IS DENIED. MS. BENNETT DID SIGN A STIPULATION AND AGREED NOT TO SEEK RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE AND IS CURRENTLY EMPLOYED AND CAN FIND ANOTHER PLACE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

APPEARANCES - ATTY. FRANCISCO A. GUTIERREZ OF THE M C HALL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 512-9865 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
DEIDRE BENNETT, TEL. NO. 440-7737, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT DEIRDRE BENNETT'S Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, CCP 1179 IS DENIED. MS. BENNETT DID SIGN A STIPULATION AND AGREED NOT TO SEEK RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE AND IS CURRENTLY EMPLOYED AND CAN FIND ANOTHER PLACE. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order.
